rgb(255, 255, 255); overflow: hidden; } .lanmu-nav .nav-pills { clear: both; } .lanmu-title { background: rgb(255, 255, 255); overflow: hidden; padding: 0= px 15px 0px 0px !important; margin-bottom: .lanmu-title p { display: -webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp: 3; -webkit-box-o= rient: vertical; overflow: hidden; font-size: 14px; letter-spacing: 0.5px; = } .lanmu-title span, .lanmu-title a { color: rgb(128, 128, 128) !important; } .lanmu-icon { display: block; float: left; margin-top: 0px; margin-right: 2= 0px; width: 320px; height: 180px; text-align: center; background: rgb(51, 5= 1, 51); color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .lanmu-icon .iconfont { display: block; margin-top: 48px; font-size: 52px; = text-shadow: rgba(0, 255, 255, 0.5) -5px 0px, rgba(255, 0, 0, 0.5) 5px 0px;= animation: shake-it 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.68, -0.55, 0.27, 1.55) 0s infinite= reverse none running; } .lanmu-icon h2 { margin-top: 10px; text-shadow: rgb(128, 128, 128) 2px 2px = 25px; padding-left: 15px !important; padding-right: 15px !important; font-s= ize: 14px !important; } .lanmu-div { margin-top: 5px; } .lanmu-div .btn { display: none !important; } .lanmu-article { padding: 0px !important; } .lanmu-article h3 { margin-top: 0px; } .lanmu-article .item { padding-left: 15px !important; padding-right: 15px != important; } .lanmu-article .item h4 { font-weight: 500; font-size: 18px; color: rgb(51,= 51, 51); line-height: 1.5; } .lanmu-article .item .item-content { color: rgb(128, 128, 128); margin-bott= om: 10px !important; } .lanmu-article .item .item-footer span { margin-right: 10px; rgb(102, 102, 102); border-left:= 5px solid rgb(221, 221, 221); padding: 2px 10px !important; margin-bottom:= 10px !important; } .list-card .cards { padding-top: 10px; overflow: hidden; } .list-card .card { background: rgb(255, 255, 255); box-shadow: none; paddin= g: 10px 15px !important; border: 1px solid rgb(241, 241, 241) !important; } .list-card .card img { margin-right: 15px; border-radius: 4px; } .list-card .card .url-pic { margin-top: 10px; } .list-card .card h3 { margin-top: 10px; margin-bottom: 10px; white-space: n= owrap; overflow: hidden; color: rgb(80, 80, 80); } .list-card .card 40, 40); } .map { margin-top: 10px; margin-bottom: 10px; } .modal { padding-left: 20px !important; padding-right: 20px !important; } @keyframes shake-it {=20 0% { text-shadow: rgba(0, 255, 255, 0.5) 0px 0px, rgba(255, 0, 0, 0.5) 0p= x 0px; } 25% { text-shadow: rgba(0, 255, 255, 0.5) -2px 0px, rgba(255, 0, 0, 0.5) = 2px 0px; } 50% { text-shadow: rgba(0, 255, 255, 0.5) -5px 0px, rgba(255, 0, 0, Content-Type: text/css Content-Transfer-Encoding: quoted-printable Content-Location: http://www.yechuang.top/style/css/zui.min.css @charset "utf-8"; article, aside, details, figcaption, figure, footer, header, hgroup, main, = nav, section, summary { display: block; } audio, canvas, video { display: inline-block; } audio:not([controls]) { display: none; height: 0px; } [hidden], template { display: none; } html { font-family: sans-serif; text-size-adjust: 100%; } body { margin: 0px; } a { background: 0px 0px; } a:focus { outline: dotted thin; } a:active, a:hover { outline: 0px; } h1 { margin: 0.67em 0px; font-size: 2em; } abbr[title] { border-bottom: 1px dotted; } b, strong { font-weight: 700; } dfn { font-style: italic; } hr { height: 0px; box-sizing: content-box; } mark { color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background: rgb(255, 255, 0); } code, kbd, pre, samp { font-family: monospace, serif; font-size: 1em; } pre { white-space: pre-wrap; } q { quotes: "=E2=80=9C" "=E2=80=9D" "=E2=80=98" "=E2=80=99"; } small { font-size: 80%; } sub, sup { position: relative; font-size: 75%; line-height: 0; vertical-ali= gn: baseline; } sup { top: -0.5em; } sub { bottom: -0.25em; } img { border: 0px; } svg:not(:root) { overflow: hidden; } figure { margin: 0px; } fieldset { padding: 0.35em 0.625em 0.75em; margin: 0px 2px; border: 1px sol= id silver; } legend { padding: 0px; border: 0px; } button, input, select, textarea { margin: 0px; font-family: inherit; font-s= ize: 100%; } button, input { line-height: normal; } button, select { text-transform: none; } button, html input[type=3D"button"], input[type=3D"reset"], input[type=3D"s= ubmit"] { -webkit-appearance: button; cursor: pointer; } button[disabled], html input[disabled] { cursor: default; } input[type=3D"checkbox"], input[type=3D"radio"] { box-sizing: border-box; p= adding: 0px; } input[type=3D"search"] { box-sizing: content-box; -webkit-appearance: textf= ield; } input[type=3D"search"]::-webkit-search-cancel-button, input[type=3D"search"= ]::-webkit-search-decoration { -webkit-appearance: none; } textarea { overflow: auto; vertical-align: top; } table { border-spacing: 0px; border-collapse: collapse; } .btn-group-vertical > .btn-group-vertical::after, .btn-group-vertical > .bt= n-group-vertical::before, .btn-group-vertical > .btn-group::after, .btn-gro= up-vertical > .btn-group::before, .btn-toolbar::after, .btn-toolbar::before= , .cards::after, .cards::before, .clearfix::after, .clearfix::before, .cont= ainer-fixed-md::after, > .icon, .tree-me= nu li > a:hover > .icon { opacity: 0.9; } .tree-menu li .list-toggle { top: 6px; right: 4px; left: auto; width: 24px;= height: 24px; opacity: 0.45; transition: all 0.3s ease 0s; } .tree-menu li .list-toggle::before { content: "=EE=99=8F"; } .tree-menu li.open > .list-toggle { opacity: 0.75; transform: rotate(90deg)= ; } .tree-menu li.open > .list-toggle::before { content: "=EE=99=8F"; } .tree-menu li > ul { background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04); } .tree-menu li li a { padding-left: 28px; border-top-color: transparent; bor= der-bottom-color: transparent; } .tree-menu li li li a { padding-left: 48px; } .tree-menu li li li li a { padding-left: 68px; } .tree-menu li.active > a { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); background-color: rgb= (50, 128, 252); border-color: rgb(50, 128, 252); } .tree-menu li.active > .list-toggle { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .tree-menu > li > a { border-width: 1px; border-style: solid; border-color:= transparent transparent rgb(221, 221, 221); border-image: initial; } .tree-menu > li.open + li > a { border-top-color: rgb(221, 221, 221); } ------MultipartBoundary--ktZKbe8NXbXeNAab9vUmDDP0HEmp8iQl1sa5HCcNDI---- Content-Type: text/css topborder { background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .weiboShow .S_title_c { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .weiboShow * { border-color: rgb(210, 210, 210); } .weiboShow .S_border_c, .weiboShow .weiboShow .weiboShow_developerDetail_namedir { color: rgb(153, 153, 153); = } .weiboShow .WB_linkA, .weiboShow .WB_linkA a, .weiboShow a { color: rgb(0, = 120, 182); } .weiboShow .WB_linkB, .weiboShow .WB_linkB a { color: rgb(154, 187, 200); } .weiboShow .weiboShow_follow, .weiboShow .weiboShow_main_allList_focus, .we= iboShow .weiboShow_main_height { background: rgb(255, 255, 255); } rgb(244, 244, 244); } .weiboShow .weiboShow_arrbar_up em { border-bottom-color: rgb(210, 210, 210= ); } .weiboShow .weiboShow_arrbar_down em { border-top-color: rgb(210, 210, 210)= ; } .weiboShow
